TextENGNew: ...At that moment,@k the reassuring voice@k came from somewhere deep within me.
changeReason: New translation adds 'from somewhere deep within me' which is more evocative than original's 'from within me,' and changes 'And then' to 'At that moment' (その時) for better temporal precision.

TextENGNew: Don't give up, K!@k@r@vS23/10/VTH_irie1002.No matter how simple a wish or dream may be,@rthe moment you give up, it's all over!!
Every man born into this world dreams of being irresistible!@k@r@vS23/08/VTH_tomi1002.It's the ultimate ambition in life!@rAre you really going to abandon it over a little setback like this?!
Nfu fu fu!
...Wh-what...?!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11232. U-uoooooooo?!
A ferocious explosive sound rang out, like meteors raining down all around me.
Three meteors, to be exact!!@k No, those aren't meteors!!@k C-could it be?!
""Every man born into this world aspires to become irresistible!!""
changeReason: New translation changes quote style from `` `` to "" (double-double quotes) indicating it's a group/chorus line, matching the Japanese convention.

TextENGNew: ""And those magical trunks can make it happen!@k@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1002. Isn't that right?!""
changeReason: New translation significantly restructures Oishi's line, changing 'Isn't that wonderful?' to just 'Isn't that right?!' and removing his laugh 'Nfu fu fu' from the dialogue.

TextENGNew: ""And if you can wear them for three hours, the magic becomes yours! The trunks get passed around! Everyone gets a turn! Each of us shall be blessed by this dream of dreams!!""
changeReason: New translation restructures Irie's speech significantly, changing the flow and specific phrasing about the trunks being passed around and everyone achieving the dream.

TextENGNew: ""T-Tommy, Cloud... and Irii!!!""
""""The Elite Four of Darkness, assembled!!!""""
Tomitake, Ooishi, and Irie's nicknames...
Or rather, their true names!! Tommy, Cloud, and Irii!!

These passionate men who would stake their entire lives on the pursuit of romance and infatuation had once confided their innermost anguish to one another, and in doing so had forged an unbreakable bond of brotherhood!
changeReason: New translation adds context about the men having 'once confided their darkest desires,' expanding the Japanese 人生の全てを賭した beyond what the original captures.

changeReason: New translation changes 'that name of yours is only temporary!!' to 'that name of yours is merely temporary!' and 'Your true name is...!!' to 'Your true name is--' (different punctuation signals interrupted speech).

TextENGNew: "The pitch-black demon king, K!!!"
At last...@rThe Elite Four of Darkness were all assembled,@rwith K at the helm.
This is incredible!! Keep it going!!

changeReason: New translation significantly changes Satoko's line: 'a group of suspicious men that look straight out of a combat manga' differs from original's 'a group of four weirdos lined up together.'

TextENGNew: "Hmph! Bringing reinforcements at this point, huh?@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1144. ...But with only three more people, these odds aren't changing."
changeReason: New translation changes Mion's line significantly: 'But with only three more people, these numbers aren't going to change much' is reworded from original about whether three reinforcements make a difference.

TextENGNew: "I-I wouldn't be so sure...@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1069. Whenever those four get together, the results are always unpredictable..."
changeReason: New translation changes Rena's dialogue from 'it turns into a disaster' to 'the results are always unpredictable,' a noticeably different characterization of the chaos.

TextENGNew: Looking at the numbers alone,@k@rit's hard to imagine three reinforcements making much difference...
changeReason: New translation simplifies from 'a drop in the bucket' to 'making much difference,' losing the original idiom.

TextENGNew: But the aura of fighting spirit radiating from their bodies was intense.@k@rSingle-mindedly pursuing their desires made these men terrifyingly powerful.
changeReason: New translation restructures the narration about fighting spirit significantly, adding 'Single-mindedly pursuing their desires' not present in the original.

TextENGNew: ...And that explosive sound from earlier@k@rmust have been the shockwave@rwhen these three landed from the sky.

Even with their numerical advantage,@k@rthe Angel Mort superfans were mere soldiers@rwho'd enlisted for a trivial reason.@k@rPitted against the Elite Four of Darkness,@k@rwhose desires burned like an inferno,@rthey weren't even in the same league.
changeReason: New translation changes the explanation of how the explosion affected the scene, replacing 'the hero enters the scene in a sci-fi movie' with 'shockwave when these three landed from the sky.'

TextENGNew: "Tommy, Cloud, Irii!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11236. I-I was in serious trouble here!! Thanks for coming!!"
changeReason: New translation changes 'We searched far and wide' to a different elaboration about 'the Angel Mort superfans were mere soldiers who'd enlisted for a trivial reason,' significantly altering the characterization.

changeReason: New translation changes 'the dream of every Japanese boy' to 'the dream that every man aspires to' and adds 'As fellow Soul Brothers, it is our duty to protect that dream!'

TextENGNew: "He-hehehehehe!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11238. Man, am I glad to see you guys!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11239. Alright, I'm going to sit back and enjoy a little sunbathing while you hold them off!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11240. What a truly, truly moving reunion of the Elite Four of Darkness!"
